title: Unusual outbound data transfer - ASSET-12 - 3:17 AM

expected_verdict.summary: Outbound transfer to known C2 server matches CVE-2024-3094 backdoor. Customer PII database partition is reachable. No authorization found. Action: Isolate ASSET-12, rotate credentials, notify DataOps-Team.
